info.name: Wialon Remote API
info.description: This is basic Postman collection for Wialon API.

exec: console.log(jsonData.token + ": here you can see token properties")
{console.log(jsonData.error + " : the length of the token should be 72 symbols")}
{console.log(jsonData.error + " : this token is expired or deleted")}

request.description:
Test tab for this request contains script that save session ID, base URL and user ID in the corresponding variables.

sessionId - this variable is for session ID (sid)

base_url - base URL parameter value from login request response.

usr_id - the ID of the current user.

exec: console.log(`${jsonData.items[i].id}: internal ID of the unit ${jsonData.items[i].nm}, it should be used in the requests`);
console.log(`${jsonData.dataFlags}: the flags value that responsible for the responce content`)
{console.log(`${jsonData.error}: check the parameters syntax or values type`);}
{console.log(`${jsonData.error}: session is expired. Presumably, the sid was not used for 5 minutes`)}
console.log(`${jsonData.items[i].id}: internal ID of the user ${jsonData.items[i].nm}, it should be used in the requests`);

{console.log(`${jsonData.error}: session is expired. Presumably, the sid was not used for 5 minutes`)}
console.log(`${jsonData.items[i].id}: resource internal ID ${jsonData.items[i].nm}, use it in further requests, e.g. for resourceId in exec_report`);
console.log(`${jsonData.dataFlags}: flags value indicates response content`)}
{console.log(`${jsonData.error}: check the parameters syntax or values type`);}
